creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text: Hello.  Sorry for the delay.  Could you confirm that the patch you linked to works with the current version of Emacs, 26.3?  So, just adding an option like FCITX_PATCH that applies this patch is all you require?  If so, I will work on this in the next day, since it's a holiday, so I'll have a bit of time.
